data.name: Race of Life - Act 2
data.detailed_description:
Jake is pulled deep into the underground world of illegal street racing.

Race, gamble, and build intense sexual relationships in this adult visual novel shaped by your choices.

Everything finally seems to be falling into place.

Your daughter Lily is showing signs of waking from her coma, your revolutionary battery project is almost ready for testing, and your name is starting to echo through the underground racing scene.

But in a world built on speed, money, and temptation… nothing comes without a price.

Sex is not a bonus - it’s a core part of the experience.

Relationships grow deeper, hotter, and far more explicit as passion turns into temptation, jealousy, and desire. Hidden fantasies and secret fetishes begin to surface, shaped by your choices.

Every decision matters.

Some bring pleasure.

Others come with consequences.

In Act 2, you continue the story and relationships from Race of Life Act 1.

Haven’t played Act 1?

Act 2 includes a choice-simulation system that recreates key decisions from the first game, letting you start with a customized relationship state.

Coming back to Race of Life?

Your saves will carry over to Act 2, allowing you to continue the story right where you left off.

  • Heavy focus on sex and explicit relationships

  • Hundreds of sex animations

  • Thousands of high-quality renders

  • Street racing mini-games and betting

  • Multiple sexual and romantic paths

  • Every female character features a unique voice, recorded by professional voice actors

  • Choice-simulation system for Act 1 decisions

  • Direct continuation of the Race of Life storyline

data.short_description: Fast cars, dirty money, real friends, and sex born from pure desire - with good humor along the way. Get behind the wheel and shape Jake’s story in this choice-driven Adult Visual Novel.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 簡體中文, 波蘭文, 俄文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
